valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 11 Feb 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Thu 12 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: Low Shannon 974 losing its identity by 0600 tomorrow. New low expected Rockall 978 by same time
